use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and compact UI
Secondary and ghost-style buttons for layered interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based button component with 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and Radix Slot for asChild composition. Features subtle shadow effects, focus-visible outlines, and comprehensive hover/disabled states. Suitable as foundational UI infrastructure for any React application requiring accessible, styled button elements.
